name: keenanpayne
description: The personal website for Keenan Payne.

scripts.assets:sass: node-sass assets/sass/app.scss _site/dist/css/app.css; postcss --use autoprefixer < _site/dist/css/app.css -b "last 2 versions" | cssmin > _site/dist/css/app.min.css
scripts.assets:build:dev: watch 'npm run assets:sass & npm run assets:js & npm run assets:fonts' 'assets/'
scripts.assets:build:prod: npm run assets:sass & npm run assets:js & npm run assets:fonts
scripts.start: npm run assets:prebuild && npm run app:build:dev
